data.title: Possible Blow to Crypto as CoreWeave Reportedly Slashes Valuation to $23B
data.description:
• CoreWeave is significantly cutting back the size and valuation of its IPO, according to Semafor.
  • The AI infrastructure firm, closely tied to bitcoin miner Core Scientific, made $1.9 billion in revenue last year.
  • Market caution around AI spending and recent tech stock struggles may be contributing to the downsized debut.

data.title: Tether Boosts Stake in $1.12B Agricultural Firm Adecoagro to 70%
data.description:
• Tether, issuer of $144 billion dollar stablecoin USDT, has boosted its stake in Latin American agricultural firm Adecoagro.
  • The $12.41 per share offer, which is subject to certain closing conditions, would take Tether's stake in Adecoagro from 51% to 70%
  • Tether is also increasing its exposure to the entertainment industry, acquiring a 30.4% stake in Italian media company Be Water for 10 million euros

data.title: Warlock Labs Raises $8M to Shake up On-Chain Order Flow
data.description:
• Warlock Labs, a company that uses on-chain data for responsible order flow processing, has raised $8 million in venture funding.
  • The firm aims to ensure fair trading by proving that none of the order flow submitted to them has been tampered with.

data.title: NYSE-Parent ICE to Explore Stablecoins, Tokenized Funds for Financial Services With Circle
data.description:
• Intercontinental Exchange, the parent company of the New York Stock Exchange, is exploring use of Circle's USDC stablecoin and USYC tokenized money market fund to develop new products.
  • "We believe Circle’s regulated stablecoins and tokenized digital currencies can play a larger role in capital markets as digital currencies become more trusted by market participants as an acceptable equivalent to the U.S. dollar," NYSE President Lynn Martin said.
  • This move is part of a larger trend of U.S. financial giants integrating digital assets, stablecoins, and tokenization into their services as regulatory concerns over the crypto industry subside.

data.title: Ripple Partners With Chipper Cash to Boost Payments in Africa Using XRP
data.description:
• Ripple is partnering with African payments provider Chipper Cash to facilitate quicker and more efficient cross-border transactions using Ripple Payments and XRP.
  • The partnership is expected to benefit Chipper Cash's five million customers across nine African countries by enabling them to receive funds from around the world swiftly and inexpensively.

data.title: Bitcoin Whales Bought $11B of BTC in Two Weeks as Confidence Grew, Glassnode Says
data.description:
• Bitcoin whales are buying coins at the fastest pace since August 2024, according to Glassnode data.
  • Other indicators like the Bitcoin 1Y+ HOLD wave show a renewed upswing, indicating a shift to a holding strategy.

data.title: Polymarket, UMA Communities Lock Horns After $7M Ukraine Bet Resolves
data.description:
• A controversial $7 million bet on Polymarket, a prediction platform, over a potential Ukraine-U.S. mineral deal has caused a rift between Polymarket and UMA communities.
  • The bet was resolved as 'yes' despite no official agreement, leading to suspicions of manipulation by a large UMA token holder, but Polymarket defended the UMA voting process.
  • Polymarket acknowledged the premature resolution and is seeking community input for preventing similar issues, promising clearer rules and updates, though specifics are yet to be announced.

data.title: Like DOGE, XRP Going Vertical Is a Good Indicator of Market Froth, Bitcoin Peaks
data.description:
• XRP, a payments-focused cryptocurrency used by Ripple for cross-border transactions, has historically rallied in the final stages of bitcoin price bull runs, marking BTC's peak.
  • Notable rallies in XRP coincided with bitcoin's peaks in 2017 and 2021, and a surge in XRP in late 2024 foreshadowed bitcoin's bull market peak above $109,000.

data.title: Northern Trust to Provide Custody, Cash Management Services for Stablecoin Issuer Haycen
data.description:
• Northern Trust is to provide custody and cash management services for Haycen, a trade finance focused stablecoin issuer.
  • Haycen offers stablecoin-based solutions for non-bank lenders in the trade finance industry.

data.title: Studio Ghibli Craze Inspires Memecoins on Ethereum, Solana After OpenAI’s 4o Release
data.description:
• A new trend of AI-generated art styled after Studio Ghibli films has gone viral, with the hashtag #GhibliAI gaining millions of hits.
  • OpenAI's 4o model, a powerful image generation tool, is behind this trend, generating artwork that mimics the unique style of Studio Ghibli.
  • The trend has sparked the creation of Ghibli-themed cryptocurrencies, with 'ghiblification' (GHIBLI) reaching a market cap of $21 million.
